Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and Metal.

Raster map textures such as satellite imagery.
A style’s fog property is a global effect that improves depth perception by fading out distant objects.
When
is active, specifies the combination of source RGB channels used to compute the raster value. Computed using the equation

abstract.code: mix.r - src.r + mix.g - src.g + mix.b - src.b + mix.a

abstract.text: . The first three components specify the mix of source red, green, and blue channels, respectively. The fourth component serves as a constant offset and is -not- multipled by source alpha. Source alpha is instead carried through and applied as opacity to the colorized result. Default value corresponds to RGB luminosity.
Displayed band of raster array source layer. Defaults to the first band if not set.
The maximum zoom level for the layer. At zoom levels equal to or greater than the maxzoom, the layer will be hidden.
Particle animation driven by textures such as wind maps.
Increase or reduce the saturation of the image.
Default value: 0. Value range: [-1, 1]
